name: rex
description: Config-driven, multi-tier agent system with composable agent primitives

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/agent-core build && bun run --cwd packages/graphd build && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --cwd apps/harness-daemon build && bun run --cwd apps/tui build && bun run --cwd apps/launcher build
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/agent-core clean && bun run --cwd packages/graphd clean && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus clean
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/agent-core lint && bun run --cwd packages/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus lint
